name: harness
description: dancinlab harness — project-agnostic AI coding harness (governance hooks for Claude Code)

plugins.name: harness
plugins.description: harness — SELF-CONTAINED governance plugin: guards (force-push · tmp · handoff-scatter · doc-scatter · askq · cloud-raw c11 · poll c19) + injects (commons · recommend · prefs · easy · architecture) + SessionStart (worktree gc · ing) + the full /command set. The repo root IS the plugin (source `.`) so the harness CLI ships inside it — hooks run ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/harness; `/plugin update` + reload refreshes CLI+hooks+commands as one unit, no separate `harness self-update`.
